domain_description: Generic boxed source-code review for governed ADF components and shared runtime modules.
focus_areas: Review-cycle contract alignment: review -> learning -> rule check -> fix -> re-review
Schema/runtime consistency across shared contracts and live consumers
Boxing, bounded file access, and audit/KPI completeness
Fallback behavior, provider drift, and duplicated runtime logic
Dead code, stale abstractions, and mirrored-module divergence
Verification quality, testability, and machine-facing evidence integrity

severity_definitions.blocking: Unsafe, contract-breaking, or guaranteed execution failure. Must be fixed before approval.
severity_definitions.major: Likely functional regression, missing protocol step, or audit gap that should block approval.
severity_definitions.minor: Low-risk inconsistency or maintainability issue that does not currently break the flow.
severity_definitions.suggestion: Optional improvement with no immediate correctness impact.

ignore_areas: Do not redesign unrelated product scope or feature direction.
Do not propose repo-wide reorganization beyond the reviewed implementation bundle.
Do not rely on files outside the boxed review bundle except the declared authority references.
full_sweep_rounds: first and last (when no material pushback remains)
